'DL and TS': Hyderabad doctor with 'James Bond-like switch' on BMW arrested
description: A doctor in Hyderabad was caught drunk driving with a BMW equipped with a hidden flip number plate. The device allowed him to switch between Delhi and Telangana registration plates, raising suspicions of road tax evasion. Police discovered the manipulation after the doctor refused to provide details, leading to his arrest for drunk driving, cheating, and impersonation.

title: FBI takes down website that stole millions from internet users across the world
description: A sophisticated global phishing operation, centered around the "W3LL phishing kit," has been dismantled by the FBI and Indonesian authorities. This "full-service" platform enabled cybercriminals to steal thousands of account credentials and attempt over $20 million in fraud. The alleged developer was detained in Indonesia, marking a significant blow to cybercrime.

title: Ctrl+Alt+Hire: How Delhi crime branch exposed high-tech remote access scam in police exams
description: Delhi Police's crime branch has busted a massive recruitment exam scam, arresting over 16 individuals, including four police officers. The syndicate, operating across multiple states, allegedly compromised Delhi Police and other Staff Selection Commission exams.  Involved insiders facilitated remote desktop cheating, demanding lakhs for guaranteed selections.  The operation has exposed significant vulnerabilities.
